---
title: "Brain graph topology"
description: "Extract morphological features from segmented WSI (Amyloid-β plaques and Tau protein aggregates), compute the associated Delaunay graph and extract topological features from it. Paper accepted at SPIE Medical Image 2023 conference."
author:
  - name: Pablo Mas
    url: https://github.com/stratifIAD/graph_topology
    affiliation: Inria / ICM (Aramis Lab)
    affiliation-url: https://www.aramislab.fr/
date: 09-01-2022
categories: [Python, Computer vision, Neuroscience, Graphs, Neuroscience] # self-defined categories
image: graph-topology.png
draft: false # setting this to `true` will prevent your post from appearing on your listing page until you're ready!
---
